content:
In the past it was asked if it was possible to make a separate testing server to try changes before they can go live, a feature that would be very useful to make more calibrate adjustments for units, covenants, posse etc, to lower the risk of releasing over or underpower modifications and then be stuck with those for a long time. 
But it was said that the team didn't have the manpower to manage a full separate server for it.

What if we make it a separate section in the base game? 
Where you don't have particular incentives to routinely participate (clearly labeled as such) and it's just a series of arc2 stages, some single bosses, some longer ones, literally copy and paste a series of old dtides stages and make them selectable at will.

With the possibility for people to test the changes to units and mechanics before they are out.
Unlocking the interested stuff only in that section.
Call it Doll Mind Palace or something (to indicate that is just a theoretical test area).

I just want a way for the team to make more adjustments whiteout the fear of breaking stuff or do emergency nerfs or ineffective buffs, literally more free beta testing and QA work from the playerbase
I wanna test my team on A4 and don't whait another week to change ring! <:point:1356053112292511815>
